intent: Project-specific cohort packs for repo-near discovery families. These cohorts should widen discovery around strong EventBear-adjacent families instead of relying only on free-text search.

priorityCohorts.label: Civic source families
priorityCohorts.why: Strong civic/public-event/source-family cluster for EventBear-like intake and adapter patterns.

priorityCohorts.label: Agenda normalization
priorityCohorts.why: Useful agenda-style extraction and normalization cohort, but secondary to civic source families.

referenceCohorts.label: Open events and location context
referenceCohorts.why: Reference cohort for location/event context and downstream open-event structures.
